attributes.description: EC2 dashboard built fresh from the in-repo docs (docs/style.md, docs/lens-panel-cookbook.md, AGENTS.md) and the EC2 wireframe. Crash-test for documentation completeness.
attributes.title: [AWS EC2] Nico WIP

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS EC2 instances across your infrastructure in real time.
Use the filters at the top to narrow by instance, region, or account. Spot outliers instantly in the summary table — click any instance to filter the dashboard, or jump directly to its logs and traces.
To get started, instrument your EC2 instances with the Elastic agent.
Distinct EC2 InstanceId values seen in `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default` over the selected time range.

attributes.description: Distinct EC2 InstanceId values seen in `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default` over the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart| KEEP total

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart| KEEP total

embeddableConfig.title: Instances by status
embeddableConfig.description: Share of healthy vs impaired instances based on status checks.

attributes.title: Instances by status (checks)
attributes.description: Share of healthy vs impaired instances based on status checks.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY instance = InstanceId | EVAL ec2_state = CASE(failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | STATS instances = COUNT(*) BY ec2_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY instance = InstanceId | EVAL ec2_state = CASE(failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | STATS instances = COUNT(*) BY ec2_state

embeddableConfig.title: EC2 instance count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Number of EC2 instances reporting metrics per 5-minute bucket, broken down by status check health (total / healthy / impaired). Built from `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default`; an instance is counted in a bucket once per bucket and classified by the worst `StatusCheckFailed.max` it reported in that bucket.

attributes.title: EC2 instance count over time
attributes.description: Number of EC2 instances reporting metrics per 5-minute bucket, broken down by status check health (total / healthy / impaired). Built from `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default`; an instance is counted in a bucket once per bucket and classified by the worst `StatusCheckFailed.max` it reported in that bucket.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL))    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), instance = InstanceId | EVAL state = CASE(failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | STATS total = COUNT(*),        healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy",        impaired = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "impaired"    BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL))    BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), instance = InstanceId | EVAL state = CASE(failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | STATS total = COUNT(*),        healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy",        impaired = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "impaired"    BY timestamp | SORT timestamp ASC

savedVis.description: AI Summary panel for the EC2 dashboard. Static mock content.

params.spec: {"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json","description":"AI Summary tile","width":"container","height":"container","padding":0,"autosize":{"type":"fit","contains":"padding"},"config":{"background":"transparent","text":{"font":"Inter, system-ui, sans-serif"}},"signals":[{"name":"padX","value":22},{"name":"footerH","value":48},{"name":"footerTopY","update":"height - footerH"},{"name":"footerMidY","update":"height - footerH/2"}],"marks":[{"type":"rect","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"value":0},"y":{"value":0},"width":{"signal":"width"},"height":{"signal":"height"},"fill":{"value":{"gradient":"linear","x1":0,"y1":0,"x2":1,"y2":1,"stops":[{"offset":0,"color":"#f7f5ff"},{"offset":1,"color":"#ece4fb"}]}}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX"},"y":{"value":30},"text":{"value":"✦"},"fontSize":{"value":22},"fill":{"value":"#7c4dff"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX + 30"},"y":{"value":30},"text":{"value":"Investigate and resolve"},"fontSize":{"value":18},"fontWeight":{"value":"bold"},"fill":{"value":"#1a1424"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"rule","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX"},"x2":{"signal":"width - padX"},"y":{"value":56},"stroke":{"value":"#dcd2f5"},"strokeWidth":{"value":1}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX"},"y":{"value":84},"text":{"value":"2 issues found"},"fontSize":{"value":14},"fontWeight":{"value":"bold"},"fill":{"value":"#1a1424"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX + 16"},"y":{"value":106},"text":{"value":"• 1 instance impaired (failing CloudWatch status checks) — likely a hardware fault."},"fontSize":{"value":13},"fill":{"value":"#2c2640"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX + 16"},"y":{"value":126},"text":{"value":"• High CPU on a subset of instances suggests an unbalanced workload or runaway process."},"fontSize":{"value":13},"fill":{"value":"#2c2640"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX"},"y":{"value":156},"text":{"value":"3 next best actions"},"fontSize":{"value":14},"fontWeight":{"value":"bold"},"fill":{"value":"#1a1424"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX + 16"},"y":{"value":178},"text":{"value":"• Open the impaired instance's logs in Discover (Instance ID → \"View logs in Discover\")."},"fontSize":{"value":13},"fill":{"value":"#2c2640"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX + 16"},"y":{"value":198},"text":{"value":"• View the instance's traces in APM to confirm impact on downstream services."},"fontSize":{"value":13},"fill":{"value":"#2c2640"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX + 16"},"y":{"value":218},"text":{"value":"• Open the EC2 console for the instance to inspect status-check details."},"fontSize":{"value":13},"fill":{"value":"#2c2640"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"rule","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX"},"x2":{"signal":"width - padX"},"y":{"signal":"footerTopY"},"stroke":{"value":"#dcd2f5"},"strokeWidth":{"value":1}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"padX"},"y":{"signal":"footerMidY"},"text":{"value":"Generated on May 14th, 2026 at 14:30  ↻"},"fontSize":{"value":12},"fill":{"value":"#6b6883"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}},{"type":"rect","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"width - padX - 160"},"y":{"signal":"footerMidY - 16"},"width":{"value":160},"height":{"value":32},"fill":{"value":"#e3d8fc"},"stroke":{"value":"#c4b1f4"},"strokeWidth":{"value":1},"cornerRadius":{"value":8}}}},{"type":"text","encode":{"enter":{"x":{"signal":"width - padX - 80"},"y":{"signal":"footerMidY"},"text":{"value":"Add to AI chat"},"fontSize":{"value":13},"fontWeight":{"value":"bold"},"fill":{"value":"#5a3fb0"},"align":{"value":"center"},"baseline":{"value":"middle"}}}}]}

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct InstanceId with at least one failed status check (`StatusCheckFailed.max > 0`).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS impaired = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL) > 0| KEEP impaired

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS impaired = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL) > 0| KEEP impaired

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct running EC2 instances that never reported a failed status check across the selected time range (MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) == 0). Strict complement of the impaired KPI.

attributes.description: Distinct running EC2 instances that never reported a failed status check across the selected time range (MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) == 0). Strict complement of the impaired KPI.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp <= ?_tend | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS max_failed = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY InstanceId | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE max_failed == 0 | KEEP healthy

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp <= ?_tend | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS max_failed = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY InstanceId | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE max_failed == 0 | KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.title: EC2 instances
embeddableConfig.description:
Per-instance roll-up sorted impaired-first. The State column is badge-coloured. **Click any Instance ID cell** for drilldown actions:
  - Open this instance's logs in Discover
  - Open this instance's traces in APM
  - Open this instance in the AWS console

Peak CPU uses the Maximum `CPUUtilization` statistic. Disk write operations use the Average `DiskWriteOps` statistic.

attributes.title: EC2 instances
attributes.description:
Per-instance roll-up sorted impaired-first. The State column is badge-coloured. **Click any Instance ID cell** for drilldown actions:
  - Open this instance's logs in Discover
  - Open this instance's traces in APM
  - Open this instance in the AWS console

Peak CPU uses the Maximum `CPUUtilization` statistic. Disk write operations use the Average `DiskWriteOps` statistic.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS c_failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)),         c_region     = MAX(cloud.region),         c_cpu        = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),         c_ebs_bal    = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteOps`, NULL)),         c_dr         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskReadBytes`, NULL))  / 1048576.0,         c_dw         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL)) / 1048576.0,         c_ni         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL))     / 1048576.0,         c_no         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkOut`, NULL))    / 1048576.0   BY InstanceId, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, 1, 2),        c_state      = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy"),        view_logs    = InstanceId | SORT c_state_sort ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS c_failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)),         c_region     = MAX(cloud.region),         c_cpu        = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),         c_ebs_bal    = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteOps`, NULL)),         c_dr         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskReadBytes`, NULL))  / 1048576.0,         c_dw         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL)) / 1048576.0,         c_ni         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL))     / 1048576.0,         c_no         = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkOut`, NULL))    / 1048576.0   BY InstanceId, cloud.region | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, 1, 2),        c_state      = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy"),        view_logs    = InstanceId | SORT c_state_sort ASC

drilldowns.label: Open this instance's logs in Discover
Open this instance's traces in APM
Open this instance in the AWS console

embeddableConfig.title: EC2 instances — hexagon map (click an hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per EC2 instance, ordered worst-first (impaired or stopping instances appear top-left). Toggle 'Color by' between Status (instance health), CPU (utilization %) or Volume utilization (%); gauge metrics support Min / Max / Avg / Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon for a drilldown menu: filter the dashboard, or jump into logs, metrics or APM traces for that instance.

savedVis.title: EC2 instances — hexagon map
savedVis.description: One hexagon per EC2 instance, ordered worst-first (impaired or stopping instances appear top-left). Toggle 'Color by' between Status (instance health), CPU (utilization %) or Volume utilization (%); gauge metrics support Min / Max / Avg / Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon for a drilldown menu: filter the dashboard, or jump into logs, metrics or APM traces for that instance.

params.spec:
{"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json","description":"One hexagon per EC2 instance, ordered worst-first (impaired or stopping instances appear top-left). Toggle 'Color by' between Status (instance health), CPU (utilization %) or Volume utilization (%); gauge metrics support Min / Max / Avg / Last over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon for a drilldown menu: filter the dashboard, or jump into logs, metrics or APM traces for that instance.","usermeta":{"x_ec2_hexmap":true},"padding":{"top":10,"left":10,"right":10,"bottom":15},"data":[{"name":"ts_probe","url":{"%type%":"esql","%context%":true,"%timefield%":"@timestamp","query":"ROW round_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(?_tstart), "|", TO_STRING(?_tend)), fetched_at = NOW()"}},{"name":"raw_all","url":{"%type%":"esql","%context%":true,"%timefield%":"@timestamp","query":"FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default"
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp <= ?_tend
  AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(attributes.InstanceId)) > 0
| STATS status_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)),
    cpu_min = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
    cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
    cpu_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
    cpu_last = LAST(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL), @timestamp)
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
    ebs_w_min = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL))
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
    ebs_w_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL))
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
    ebs_w_avg = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL))
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL) IS NOT NULL,
    ebs_w_last = LAST(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL), @timestamp)
      WHERE CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL) IS NOT NULL
  BY instance_id = attributes.InstanceId
| EVAL status_num = CASE(status_max > 0, 1, 0),
    status_label = CASE(status_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy"),
    severity_rank = CASE(status_max > 0, 0, 1),
    ebs_w_min = ebs_w_min / 1048576,
    ebs_w_max = ebs_w_max / 1048576,
    ebs_w_avg = ebs_w_avg / 1048576,
    ebs_w_last = ebs_w_last / 1048576,
    round_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(?_tstart), "|", TO_STRING(?_tend)),
    fetched_at = NOW()
| KEEP instance_id, status_num, status_label, severity_rank,
    cpu_min, cpu_max, cpu_avg, cpu_last,
    ebs_w_min, ebs_w_max, ebs_w_avg, ebs_w_last,
    round_key, fetched_at
| LIMIT 10000"}},{"name":"ranked_status","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["severity_rank","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_cpu_min","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.cpu_min == null ? 1e12 : -datum.cpu_min * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_cpu_max","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.cpu_max == null ? 1e12 : -datum.cpu_max * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_cpu_avg","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.cpu_avg == null ? 1e12 : -datum.cpu_avg * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_cpu_last","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.cpu_last == null ? 1e12 : -datum.cpu_last * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_ebs_w_min","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.ebs_w_min == null ? 1e12 : -datum.ebs_w_min * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_ebs_w_max","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.ebs_w_max == null ? 1e12 : -datum.ebs_w_max * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_ebs_w_avg","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.ebs_w_avg == null ? 1e12 : -datum.ebs_w_avg * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"ranked_ebs_w_last","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"sort_key","expr":"datum.ebs_w_last == null ? 1e12 : -datum.ebs_w_last * 1000000"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["sort_key","instance_id"],"order":["ascending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["active_rank"]}]},{"name":"active","values":[],"on":[{"trigger":"ts_round !== '' && active_round !== '' && active_round !== ts_round","remove":"true"},{"trigger":"metric === 'status' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_status')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'cpu' && agg === 'min' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_cpu_min')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'cpu' && agg === 'max' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_cpu_max')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'cpu' && agg === 'avg' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_cpu_avg')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'cpu' && agg === 'last' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_cpu_last')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'ebs_w' && agg === 'min' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_ebs_w_min')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'ebs_w' && agg === 'max' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_ebs_w_max')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'ebs_w' && agg === 'avg' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_ebs_w_avg')"},{"trigger":"metric === 'ebs_w' && agg === 'last' && len_raw > 0 && raw_round === ts_round && ts_round !== ''","remove":"true","insert":"data('ranked_ebs_w_last')"}]},{"name":"instances","source":"active","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"active_val","expr":"metric=='status' ? null : (metric=='cpu'   ? (agg=='min' ? datum.cpu_min : agg=='max' ? datum.cpu_max : agg=='avg' ? datum.cpu_avg : datum.cpu_last)   : (agg=='min' ? datum.ebs_w_min : agg=='max' ? datum.ebs_w_max : agg=='avg' ? datum.ebs_w_avg : datum.ebs_w_last))"},{"type":"formula","as":"index0","expr":"datum.active_rank - 1"},{"type":"formula","as":"col","expr":"datum.index0 % gridCols"},{"type":"formula","as":"row","expr":"floor(datum.index0 / gridCols)"},{"type":"formula","as":"x","expr":"datum.col * gapX + (datum.row % 2 == 1 ? gapX / 2 : 0) + hexR + 5"},{"type":"formula","as":"y","expr":"datum.row * gapY + hexR + 5 + hexOffsetY"},{"type":"formula","as":"hexSize","expr":"hexR * hexR * 3.46"}]},{"name":"status_counts","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"aggregate","groupby":["status_num"],"ops":["count"],"as":["count"]}]},{"name":"status_legend","values":[{"label":"Impaired","val":1},{"label":"Healthy","val":0}],"transform":[{"type":"lookup","from":"status_counts","key":"status_num","fields":["val"],"values":["count"],"as":["count"],"default":0},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["idx"]}]},{"name":"util_counts","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"v","expr":"agg == 'min' ? datum.cpu_min : agg == 'max' ? datum.cpu_max : agg == 'avg' ? datum.cpu_avg : datum.cpu_last"},{"type":"formula","as":"bucket","expr":"datum.v == null ? 3 : (datum.v >= 85 ? 2 : datum.v >= 60 ? 1 : 0)"},{"type":"aggregate","groupby":["bucket"],"ops":["count"],"as":["count"]}]},{"name":"util_legend_stops","values":[{"label":"≥ 85%","val":90,"bucket":2,"is_nodata":false},{"label":"60 – 84%","val":70,"bucket":1,"is_nodata":false},{"label":"< 60%","val":0,"bucket":0,"is_nodata":false},{"label":"No data","val":null,"bucket":3,"is_nodata":true}],"transform":[{"type":"lookup","from":"util_counts","key":"bucket","fields":["bucket"],"values":["count"],"as":["count"],"default":0},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["idx"]}]},{"name":"vol_counts","source":"raw_all","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"v","expr":"agg == 'min' ? embeddableConfig.description: Total Network In summed across instances; converted from bytes to GiB.

attributes.description: Total Network In summed across instances; converted from bytes to GiB.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS net_in = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1073741824.0

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS net_in = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1073741824.0

attributes.title: Network In (+) / Out (−) MiB/period
attributes.description: Average network in/out byte rates per instance, MiB/period. Out series negated.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS col_ni = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1048576.0, col_no = -AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkOut`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS col_ni = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1048576.0, col_no = -AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkOut`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Disk read (+) / write (−) MiB/period
embeddableConfig.description: Average EC2 disk read and write byte volume per instance, MiB/period. Write series negated.

attributes.title: Disk read (+) / write (−) MiB/period
attributes.description: Average EC2 disk read and write byte volume per instance, MiB/period. Write series negated.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskReadBytes`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS col_dr = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskReadBytes`, NULL)) / 1048576.0, col_dw = -AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskReadBytes`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS col_dr = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskReadBytes`, NULL)) / 1048576.0, col_dw = -AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 instances by peak CPU (%)
embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 EC2 instances ranked by peak CPU% across the dashboard time range. **Alert threshold: 80%** — any bar at or above that value is over the limit.

attributes.title: Top 10 instances by peak CPU (%)
attributes.description: Top 10 EC2 instances ranked by peak CPU% across the dashboard time range. **Alert threshold: 80%** — any bar at or above that value is over the limit.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS peak_cpu = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))   BY InstanceId | SORT peak_cpu DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS peak_cpu = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))   BY InstanceId | SORT peak_cpu DESC | LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 instances by avg network in (MB)
embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 EC2 instances ranked by average NetworkIn per CloudWatch sample period (megabytes per ~5 min).

attributes.title: Top 10 instances by avg network in (MB)
attributes.description: Top 10 EC2 instances ranked by average NetworkIn per CloudWatch sample period (megabytes per ~5 min).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS avg_netin_mb = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY InstanceId | SORT avg_netin_mb DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS avg_netin_mb = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1048576.0 BY InstanceId | SORT avg_netin_mb DESC | LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 instances by total disk writes (GiB)
embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 EC2 instances ranked by cumulative DiskWriteBytes over the dashboard time range (GiB).

attributes.title: Top 10 instances by total disk writes (GiB)
attributes.description: Top 10 EC2 instances ranked by cumulative DiskWriteBytes over the dashboard time range (GiB).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS total_ebs_write_gb = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL)) / 1073741824.0 BY InstanceId | SORT total_ebs_write_gb DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS total_ebs_write_gb = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`, NULL)) / 1073741824.0 BY InstanceId | SORT total_ebs_write_gb DESC | LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.title: Disk write operations by instance
embeddableConfig.description: Average EC2 DiskWriteOps per instance in 5-minute buckets. Higher values indicate instances writing more frequently to attached storage.

attributes.title: Disk write operations by instance
attributes.description: Average EC2 DiskWriteOps per instance in 5-minute buckets. Higher values indicate instances writing more frequently to attached storage.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0   AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteOps`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS metric = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteOps`, NULL))   BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC
ROW alert_threshold = 20

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0   AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteOps`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS metric = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteOps`, NULL))   BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: CPU utilization — peak per 5 min (%)
embeddableConfig.description: Per-instance peak CPU% in 5-minute buckets. Dashed red line at 80% marks the alert threshold.

attributes.title: CPU utilization — peak per 5 min (%)
attributes.description: Per-instance peak CPU% in 5-minute buckets. Dashed red line at 80% marks the alert threshold.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0   AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS metric = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))   BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC
ROW alert_threshold = 80

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0   AND LENGTH(TO_STRING(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))) > 0 | STATS metric = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL))   BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 5 minutes), InstanceId | SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Recent EC2 logs
embeddableConfig.description: Recent log lines from `logs-*` filtered to dataset `generic.otel` (the only dataset in this cluster that carries EC2 host logs with `cloud.instance.id` / `host.name` populated). Click an Instance ID cell to filter the dashboard by that instance.

attributes.title: Recent EC2 logs
attributes.description: Recent log lines from `logs-*` filtered to dataset `generic.otel` (the only dataset in this cluster that carries EC2 host logs with `cloud.instance.id` / `host.name` populated). Click an Instance ID cell to filter the dashboard by that instance.

query.esql: FROM "logs-*" | KEEP @timestamp, data_stream.dataset, cloud.instance.id, host.name, message | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(message)) > 0 | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 200
FROM "logs-*" | KEEP @timestamp, data_stream.dataset, cloud.instance.id, host.name, message | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(message)) > 0 | SORT @timestamp DESC | LIMIT 200
